Bonafide: Did you know you've got bonus points? 💎 Cash them in to save on your next order: bonafide.attn.tv/aQ7eLikuPlXQ

Bonafide: Vaginal itching during menopause is common - get 6 expert-backed tips for real relief and comfort. bonafide.attn.tv/anmqjFPoBWaF

Bonafide: Great news! Your order (6282318) has shipped and will be to you soon. Click here to track your order: https://bonafide.attn.tv/aSdXW7vKZbeN 

Visit our website: https://bonafide.attn.tv/aGeyklZh1SN2
How do I cancel this?

Bonafide: I understand you wish to cancel. To cancel your subscription, log in to your account and find the subscription you'd like to cancel. Click the "Cancel Subscription" button, found underneath the product quantity on the right-hand side. In the box that pops up, select the reason you would like to cancel your subscription, and click "Unsubscribe". You'll receive a confirmation message that your subscription has been canceled, and the page will automatically refresh to remove the product.

We're sorry to see you go, and if you have any feedback that we can share with our internal team, please let us know as we're always working to improve our customers' experiences.
I already did this and I already asked for a refund from you guys which you did. I'm not sure why I'm still receiving these. I had a reaction to the product.
Bonafide: Sorry about what happened and this is definitely not the experience we want you to have. Kindly provide your email address and I'll check this with my team.
Beelsashley@gmail.com
It's OK. You guys honestly handled it so well.  the reaction I got from the product was not fun. I was shocked I got a refund though. So I was very thankful.
Bonafide: Thank you for sending the details. I've forwarded your concern to the team and I'll update you as soon as I hear back from them!

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

promotions.title: Birkenstock Membership Details
content:

promotions.title: New Member 10% Off
content:
• 10% off one full-priced order for new members.

• The unique code is in the account confirmation email after registration.

• One-time use only; cannot be reused or reissued if the order is canceled.

• Expires 30 days after issuance.

• Only share if the customer asks.

Extra 10% off select vacuums, PuriCare air purifiers, TONE Free headphones and XBOOM Go wireless speakers is off the pre-tax sale price on LG.com only. To receive the additional 10% off savings, promotion code must be entered at online checkout and will be applied to eligible products only. If any of the qualifying items are removed from the cart, canceled or returned, the promotional savings will be void. Availability, prices and terms of offer are subject to change without notice. No adjustments to prior purchases and non-redeemable for cash.
